title: Storm Chasing Modpack
description: The Storm Chasing Modpack, which allows for players to explore the world by traveling vehicles from the vehicle mods such as Automobility to chase storms and also tornadoes.
body:
The Storm Chasing Modpack, is a modpack which allows for players to explore the open world through storm chasing with vehicle mods such as automobility and immersive aircraft.

As of the lastest modpack version, there is now ProtoManlys Weather Mod which you can chase much more realistic tornadoes. 

# Features (NeoForge) - Current

- ChoiceTheorem’s Overhauled Village
- Automobility
- Immersive Aircraft
- ProtoManly’s Weather
- EAS Addon for ProtoManly’s Weather Mod
- Waystones
- Journeymap
- Exposure (Camera Mod)
- WTHIT
- BetterF3
- AmbientSounds
- Towns and Towers
- Structory: Towers
